title: 1. Mr. Wang was a 36 year old office worker who had sciatica on the left side an
text:
painful area was on the gallbladder channel. He was treated by pricking the raised blue vein between
FengLong (ST 40) and YangLingQuan (GB 34) to let out some blood and he was cured after only one
treatment.
汪XX，36岁，公务员。左腿坐骨神经痛，不能行走，疼痛部位属胆经，视其左腿丰隆至阳陵
泉一带有青筋鼓起，刺之出血，l次痊愈，行走如常。
